examples: Eager to duck strict parents and the social taboos of dating in public, young Kuwaitis have taken to cafes, beaming flirtatious infrared e-mails to one another on their cell phones.
He was dashing, self-confident and flirtatious.
The illusionist has come to the remote town, at the invitation of an enthusiastic admirer who was a Scot with a flirtatious kilt.
Jill Kelly who, in turn, had been exchanging flirtatious emails with General John Allen.
Amy Poehler's flirtatious energy enlivens Best Buy's pedestrian retail message: the salespeople are helpful.
